## What changed

Describe the main change in 2-5 bullet points.

## Why this change

Explain the problem being solved and why this approach was chosen.

## Risk and impact

- [ ] Low risk
- [ ] Medium risk
- [ ] High risk (requires extra review)

Describe any impact on MEG boundaries, authorization logic, or audit behavior.

## Testing

- [ ] I tested allowed-path behavior
- [ ] I tested denied-path behavior
- [ ] I updated docs if needed

## Checklist

- [ ] Changelog updated (if user-facing change)
